basic_details.job_title: STPI Member Technical Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) Member Technical Staff- E-V, (Scientist ‘F’) Notification 2026 has been released on 11 April 2026 on the official website STPI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the STPI Member Technical Staff- E-V, (Scientist ‘F’) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 48 years for Direct Recruitment, 56 years for Absorption/Deputation
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 48 years for Direct Recruitment. Age Relaxation: Up to 56 years for Absorption/Deputation candidates. Government rules are applicable for further relaxations.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors/Masters/Ph.D in Engineering/Technology/Science with 12-17 years of experience.
qualification.details: Member Technical Staff- E-V, (Scientist ‘F’): Bachelors degree in Engineering/Technology (1st class) + 17 years experience Masters in Computer Applications (1st class) + 17 years experience M.Sc (1st class) + 17 years experience Master Degree in Tech./Engineering (1st class) + 15 years experience Ph.D in Science/Engineering + 12 years experience

salary_details.details: Post: Member Technical Staff- E-V, (Scientist ‘F’) Pay Scale: Level 13A (Rs. 131100-216600)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPI Member Technical Staff- E-V, (Scientist ‘F’) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of STPI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for STPI Scientist F recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Member Technical Staff- E-V (Scientist ‘F’) position at STPI is 25 May 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their registration well before the deadline to avoid any technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for this post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 01 vacancy available for the Member Technical Staff- E-V (Scientist ‘F’) post under this recruitment cycle. The vacancy is open for candidates meeting the specific educational and experience requirements mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Scientist F position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Member Technical Staff- E-V (Scientist ‘F’) post will be placed in Level 13A of the pay matrix, with a salary range of Rs. 131,100 to Rs. 216,600 per month, as per the official STPI notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee is Rs. 1000 for General and OBC category candidates. However, female candidates and those belonging to SC, ST, or PH categories are exempted from paying the application fee for this recruitment process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st class Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology, Master's in Computer Applications, M.Sc, Master's in Engineering/Technology, or a Ph.D in Science/Engineering, along with the required years of professional experience ranging from 12 to 17 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for direct recruitment?
faq.answer: For direct recruitment, the maximum age limit for the Member Technical Staff- E-V (Scientist ‘F’) post is 48 years. Candidates applying through absorption or deputation may be considered up to the age of 56 years.

faq.question: Q7. How will the selection be conducted?
faq.answer: The selection process for the STPI Scientist F post involves two main stages: an administrative screening of the applications followed by a personal interview for the shortlisted candidates who meet all the eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply offline for this job?
faq.answer: No, the application process for the STPI Member Technical Staff- E-V (Scientist ‘F’) recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must visit the official website at www.stpi.in to submit their applications and pay the required fees.

faq.question: Q9. Is experience mandatory for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, professional experience is mandatory. Depending on the educational qualification, candidates are required to have between 12 to 17 years of relevant experience in the field to be eligible for the Scientist ‘F’ position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification for the STPI recruitment can be found on the official website www.stpi.in. You can also refer to the "Important Links" section provided in this article to access the notification directly once it is available.
